zh.Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯
zh.Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭金加迪爾格倫維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar於1485年出生在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭時，她的父親Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar40歲，母親Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock25歲。她於1501年與Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig在蘇格蘭金加迪爾格倫維結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1512年10月15日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年27歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland: 苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯
zh-hans.Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland: 苏格兰金加迪爾格倫維
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar于1485年出生在苏格兰薩瑟蘭时，她的父亲Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar40岁，母亲Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock25岁。她于1501年与Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig在苏格兰金加迪爾格倫維结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1512年10月15日在苏格兰雷福福爾享年27岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar was born in 1485, in Sutherland, Scotland, her father, Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar, was 40 and her mother, Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock, was 25. She married Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig in 1501, in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 15 October 1512, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 27, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar est née en 1485, à Sutherland, Écosse, son père, Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig en 1501, à Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 octobre 1512, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar 1485 in Sutherland, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar 40 und ihre Mutter Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock 25. Sie hat 1501 in Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Oktober 1512 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar è nata il nel 1485 nel Sutherland, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig nel 1501, nel Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 ottobre 1512, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.Lochinvar, Sutherland, Scotland: スコットランドススエルランド
ja.Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズ
ja.Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland: スコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアグレンバーヴィ
ja.Kilmarnock, Renfrewshire, Scotland: スコットランドレンフリューシュアイア
ja.Scotland: イギリススコットランド
ja.Kenmore, Kirkcudbrighttshire, Scotland: スコットランドペルスシュアイアケンモー
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvarが1485年にスコットランドススエルランドで生まれた時，父Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvarは40歳，母Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnockは25歳であった。1501年にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアグレンバーヴィでSir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1512年10月15日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで27歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar(이)가 1485년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1501년 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르 글렌버비에서 Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1512년 10월 15일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar nasceu em 1485, em Sutherland, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig em 1501, em Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1512, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar родилась в 1485 г. в местности сутирланд, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig в 1501 г. в местности гленбирви, кинкардаинешир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 октября 1512 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Gordon of Lochinvar nació en 1485, en Sutherland, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Gordon 2nd Of Lochinvar, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Annabella Boyd of Kilmarnock, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir William Douglas 6th Lord of Drumlanrig en 1501, en Glenbervie, Kincardineshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1512, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
